steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the mihrab is "foundational to traditional mosque architecture" and that even mosques blending multiple styles still include it. The blank must describe a feature that is the defining, prototypical example of its kind — not merely impressive, decorated, or novel.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — an imposing: Imposing means large or commanding in appearance. The passage says nothing about the mihrab's size or visual impact — only its centrality to mosque design. ✗
  • Choice B — an embellished: Embellished means decorated or ornamented. The passage is about how foundational the feature is, not how ornate it is. ✗
  • Choice C — a quintessential: Quintessential means representing the most perfect or typical example of something. A feature that is foundational to the tradition and present even across mixed-style mosques is by definition the quintessential element of mosque design. ✓
  • Choice D — an unprecedented: Unprecedented means never done before. The mihrab is a longstanding traditional feature — calling it unprecedented contradicts the passage entirely. ✗
C is correct.
